examples: Capital punishment was regarded as inhuman and immoral.
There is nothing sinful or immoral about being emotional, unless your emotions make you inhuman, insensitive and cruel to others.
If it is true that the only paradises are those we have lost, I will know what name to give the tender and inhuman something that dwells in me today.
It was a crude piece of software working, but it also was transparently inhuman beyond that.
Their faces peering from newspaper pages are daily reminders of the human toll of an inhuman crime.
